title: Level LIb
body:
Welcome to LevelLib! This is a mod I created using Mcreator, so go check it out here https://mcreator.net/ and safe I promise.
 
This mod is a support that is used together with another mod to start.
Adds 2 very powerful weapons which are not craftable.

This mod must be used especially in conjunction with this other:
https://modrinth.com/mod/657399

Unfortunately I have no images to represent the mod.

This is a support that will be ready only for version 1.12.
